allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Name | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "--- gradle cmd?"; \(Get-Command gradle -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse "app\\src\\main" -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'assets' } | Select-Object FullName; Write-Output "---catalog?"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse "app\\src\\main" -Filter "catalog.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; g={}; [g.setdefault\(re.match\(r'^\([A-Za-z]+\\d+?\)\(\\d\)\\.',i['filename']\).group\(1\),{}\).__setitem__\(int\(re.match\(r'^\([A-Za-z]+\\d+?\)\(\\d\)\\.',i['filename']\).group\(2\)\), i['filename']\) for i in d if re.match\(r'^\([A-Za-z]+\\d+?\)\(\\d\)\\.',i['filename']\)]; print\('groups:', len\(g\)\); [print\(k, sorted\(v.items\(\)\)\) for k,v in list\(g.items\(\)\)[:4]]")
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "---gradle---"; \(Get-Command gradle -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell($root = "C:\\Users\\maing\\AndroidStudioProjects\\parallax-wallpaper\\app\\src\\main"; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "$root\\java\\com\\galaxywall\\app\\ui\\language","$root\\java\\com\\galaxywall\\app\\ui\\survey","$root\\java\\com\\galaxywall\\app\\ui\\onboarding" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Force "$root\\res\\layout\\activity_language.xml","$root\\res\\layout\\activity_language_1.xml","$root\\res\\layout\\activity_language_2.xml","$root\\res\\layout\\activity_onboarding.xml","$root\\res\\layout\\fragment_onboarding.xml" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "deleted"; Get-ChildItem "$root\\java\\com\\galaxywall\\app\\ui" -Directory | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; if \(Test-Path $adb\) { Write-Output "ADB found: $adb"; & $adb version; Write-Output "---DEVICES---"; & $adb devices -l } else { Write-Output "ADB not at default path" })

PowerShell($sdk = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk"; Write-Output "=== System images installed ==="; Get-ChildItem "$sdk\\system-images" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $_.Name; Get-ChildItem $_.FullName | ForEach-Object { "  " + $_.Name } }; Write-Output "=== avdmanager ==="; $am = Get-ChildItem "$sdk\\cmdline-tools" -Recurse -Filter avdmanager.bat -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($am\) { $am.FullName } else { "avdmanager not found" })

PowerShell($c = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\maing\\AndroidStudioProjects\\parallax-wallpaper\\qa-testing\\run_smoke.ps1" -Raw; $open = \([regex]::Matches\($c,'\\{'\)\).Count; $close = \([regex]::Matches\($c,'\\}'\)\).Count; Write-Output "open={$open} close={$close}"; $sq = \([regex]::Matches\($c,"'"\)\).Count; $dq = \([regex]::Matches\($c,'"'\)\).Count; Write-Output "singlequotes=$sq doublequotes=$dq")
